  best-practices: 'End-to-end Databricks best practices: cost, security, governance,

  integrations: 'Patterns and code for integrating Databricks with external systems:

    logs, query history, and debugging tools.

  architecture-patterns: Patterns and reference architectures for Databricks lakehouse,

    on Azure.
skill_description: Expert knowledge for Azure Databricks development including troubleshooting,

  security, configuration, integrations & coding patterns, and deployment. Use when
